name: Cowboy Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups shortening (or part butter or margarine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F; grease cookie sheets.
2. Mix the shortening, sugars, eggs, and vanilla extract in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, salt, and baking powder to the mixture; stir until just mixed.
4. Stir in the oats, then fold in the chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto prepared cookie sheets.
6. Bake for about 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Remove from pans and allow to cool on wire racks.
